category_sources: source_facts.description says strip-nondeterminism strips bits of nondeterministic information from files.
source_facts.homepage is the Debian Reproducible Builds Salsa repository.
display_name_sources: Official Debian Salsa repository and manpage use strip-nondeterminism.
docs_sources: Official Debian manpages document strip-nondeterminism and dh_strip_nondeterminism.
source_facts.repo is the official Debian Salsa repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has the official repository URL https://salsa.debian.org/reproducible-builds/strip-nondeterminism, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official Debian manpage describes removing uninteresting nondeterministic information so builds are reproducible.
source_facts.description identifies stripping nondeterministic file metadata.
